CustomField.description: Effective Difference reflects the difference between the MR calculated for TrueUp Utilization and previously accrued MR balance, for a supplemental rent. This field is only visible when the Supplemental Rent Type is End of Lease Adjustment.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Effective Difference reflects the difference between the MR calculated for TrueUp Utilization and previously accrued MR balance, for a supplemental rent. This field is only visible when the Supplemental Rent Type is End of Lease Adjustment.
CustomField.label: Effective Difference
